titleStmt.title: SII 7.379: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 379. (A.R. No. 174 of 1901). ON THE FOURTH SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śrī śakavaruśa 1304 duṁdubhisaṁ
vatsarada vayiśākha su 15 sō śrīma
nmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara Arirāyavibhaḍa
bhāśegetapuvarāyaragaṁḍa pūrvvada
kṣiṇapaścimasamudrādhipati śrīvīrahariya
paOḍeyaru rājyābhyudaya paripālana
ya māḍuvalli A hariyapaOḍiyara nirū
padiṁ śrīmanmuhāpradhānaṁ jekkaṁṇnaOḍiya
ru bārakūrarājyavanū paripālisuvalli Ā bārakū
ra kōṭeyakēriya halara Ādhīnava māḍi taṁgā
yiseṭiti mārkaṁḍēśvaradēvaroḷage Obba brā
hmaṇaṁge rudrapūjeyāgi māḍi mattaṁ prati
Amāvase pratidvādaśeyali Obbobba brāhma
ṇabhōjana naḍadubahudu yi dharma naḍavaṁtāge
kōṭiya nālvaruseṭṭikāṟaru budhivaṁtaru sama
stahalara kayiyali māciseṭṭiya baḷiyava
ra bāḷiṁdaṁ mūḍalu mārkaṁḍēśvaradēvara dēva
svadiṁdaṁ teṁkalu sōmanāthadēvara dēvasvadiṁ
daṁ paḍuvalu janārdanadēvara dēvasvadiṁdaṁ baḍa
galu yiṁtī catussīmeyiṁdoḷaguḷa huṁ
peve gade bittuva bedegaṇilu nāgaṁḍugadalu mu
36 Aṟu nāgaṁṇakāṭhāri bittuva mekeyalu
bhatta muḍe 3 mūṟanu taṁgāyiseṭṭiti Arththapa
ricsēdavāgi koṭṭu mulaparitsēdavāgi koṭaru .
yi dharmma Ācaṁdrārkavāgi naḍavahaṁge mārkaṁ
ḍēśvaradēvara saṁnidhiyallu dhāreya neṟadu ko
ṭṭaru . yi dharmmavanu Āṁnyāya Aḷidavaru vāraṇasiya
lli sāvira kavileya vadhisida pāpadalu hōharu .
Digital edition of SII 7.379 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
